"All Mods by MrCrayfish" is an Minecraft NeoForge modpack with Mods by [MrCrayfish](https://mrcrayfish.com/)

---

Whether you're furnishing your house with Refurbished Furniture, mailing gifts with Mighty Mail, or trading with Goblin Traders, this pack delivers the ultimate MrCrayfish experience
